name: claude
command: claude --print --no-session-persistence --dangerously-skip-permissions --permission-mode bypassPermissions "Run specdev review $SPECDEV_PHASE --round $SPECDEV_ROUND. Follow its instructions exactly. You MUST append a ## Round $SPECDEV_ROUND section with **Verdict:** approved or **Verdict:** needs-changes to the feedback file printed by specdev review before exiting. Do not only summarize in stdout."
